_comment: Merge these two entries into your x402-sandbox products.json `products` array, then restart the gateway (systemctl --user restart x402-sandbox). Both proxy to the x402-books backend on 127.0.0.1:8404 - the gateway owns payment, wallet, and facilitator config; this backend just computes. Adjust price to taste.

products.title: x402 Books (per report)
products.description: Accountant-ready books for any x402 seller wallet. POST {"wallet": "0x...", "period": "YYYY-MM", "jurisdiction": "ZA|US|NONE"} and get revenue, valuation, journal, and cost-basis reports from public on-chain settlements.

products.title: x402 Books (human web report)
products.description: Browser-payable books report. Fill in wallet, period, jurisdiction on the form, pay with your Base wallet, get revenue/valuation/journal/costbasis back.
